title: An enabled_builtin_tools map with no key for the running agent fails fast
description: enabled_builtin_tools is keyed by descriptor.agent_name. A present map without the running agent's key means the Commission filters the tool surface but was not authored for this agent; running it anyway (unfiltered or guessed) would silently change the experiment. The agent MUST emit error_occurred with code commission_collision and stop with reason error BEFORE any model turn (no assistant_message). Uses a key no real agent owns so the case behaves identically on every agent.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
